choices.text: Longest path through activity network = minimum project duration. Activities on it have zero total float. Delaying any critical activity delays project completion. Identified via forward + backward pass calculations.

questions.explanation: Critical path = longest network path, zero float.

choices.text: Crashing: add resources (overtime, extra crew) to critical activities — costs more per day saved. Fast-tracking: overlap normally sequential activities (start framing 2nd floor while finishing 1st) — risk of rework. Update schedule + assess cost/risk.
